default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Demo and discuss Semrush Enterprise and AIO products for potential adoption by growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/-z2iTS6-S_oE8pFS5wCQdC8TRAFxoH52?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Semrush Enterprise offers comprehensive SEO analysis, content optimization, and technical site auditing capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/-z2iTS6-S_oE8pFS5wCQdC8TRAFxoH52?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [AIO product for AI content analysis is still developing and may not meet growthx.ai's current needs](https://fathom.video/share/-z2iTS6-S_oE8pFS5wCQdC8TRAFxoH52?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Pricing is customized based on number of projects, keywords, and desired features](https://fathom.video/share/-z2iTS6-S_oE8pFS5wCQdC8TRAFxoH52?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
  - [growthx.ai team interested in Enterprise product, but needs more pricing details to make a decision](https://fathom.video/share/-z2iTS6-S_oE8pFS5wCQdC8TRAFxoH52?tab=summary&timestamp=2442.0)

## Topics

### AIO Product Overview

  - [Uses Keyword Magic Tool to generate prompts and questions](https://fathom.video/share/-z2iTS6-S_oE8pFS5wCQdC8TRAFxoH52?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)
  - [Tracks AI platform mentions and sentiment across multiple models](https://fathom.video/share/-z2iTS6-S_oE8pFS5wCQdC8TRAFxoH52?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [No API access currently available, limiting integration possibilities](https://fathom.video/share/-z2iTS6-S_oE8pFS5wCQdC8TRAFxoH52?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [Still in early stages, with focus on adding markets/languages](https://fathom.video/share/-z2iTS6-S_oE8pFS5wCQdC8TRAFxoH52?tab=summary&timestamp=2362.0)

### Enterprise SEO Platform Capabilities

  - [Provides detailed traffic and keyword performance analysis](https://fathom.video/share/-z2iTS6-S_oE8pFS5wCQdC8TRAFxoH52?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [Offers content optimization tools with AI-powered recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/-z2iTS6-S_oE8pFS5wCQdC8TRAFxoH52?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
  - [Includes technical site auditing and page speed analysis](https://fathom.video/share/-z2iTS6-S_oE8pFS5wCQdC8TRAFxoH52?tab=summary&timestamp=1845.0)
  - [Allows for A/B testing and Google Analytics integration](https://fathom.video/share/-z2iTS6-S_oE8pFS5wCQdC8TRAFxoH52?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)

### Pricing Structure

  - [Based on tiered system (Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum)](https://fathom.video/share/-z2iTS6-S_oE8pFS5wCQdC8TRAFxoH52?tab=summary&timestamp=2054.0)
  - [Customized pricing depends on:](https://fathom.video/share/-z2iTS6-S_oE8pFS5wCQdC8TRAFxoH52?tab=summary&timestamp=2127.0)
      - [Number of client projects](https://fathom.video/share/-z2iTS6-S_oE8pFS5wCQdC8TRAFxoH52?tab=summary&timestamp=2193.0)
      - [Keywords tracked per client](https://fathom.video/share/-z2iTS6-S_oE8pFS5wCQdC8TRAFxoH52?tab=summary&timestamp=2266.0)
      - [Technical crawling needs](https://fathom.video/share/-z2iTS6-S_oE8pFS5wCQdC8TRAFxoH52?tab=summary&timestamp=2151.0)
      - [Service token usage for various features](https://fathom.video/share/-z2iTS6-S_oE8pFS5wCQdC8TRAFxoH52?tab=summary&timestamp=2262.0)

### Decision-Making Process

  - [growthx.ai team to review demo recording internally](https://fathom.video/share/-z2iTS6-S_oE8pFS5wCQdC8TRAFxoH52?tab=summary&timestamp=2463.0)
  - [Semrush to provide detailed pricing proposal](https://fathom.video/share/-z2iTS6-S_oE8pFS5wCQdC8TRAFxoH52?tab=summary&timestamp=2423.0)
  - [Potential for async Q\&A via Slack channel for growthx.ai team members](https://fathom.video/share/-z2iTS6-S_oE8pFS5wCQdC8TRAFxoH52?tab=summary&timestamp=2494.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to provide project, keyword, and technical crawling requirements to Semrush](https://fathom.video/share/-z2iTS6-S_oE8pFS5wCQdC8TRAFxoH52?tab=summary&timestamp=2306.0)
  - [Semrush to prepare and send detailed pricing proposal](https://fathom.video/share/-z2iTS6-S_oE8pFS5wCQdC8TRAFxoH52?tab=summary&timestamp=2423.0)
  - [Set up Slack channel for async Q\&A with growthx.ai team](https://fathom.video/share/-z2iTS6-S_oE8pFS5wCQdC8TRAFxoH52?tab=summary&timestamp=2504.0)
  - [growthx.ai to make decision on Enterprise product within a week of receiving pricing](https://fathom.video/share/-z2iTS6-S_oE8pFS5wCQdC8TRAFxoH52?tab=summary&timestamp=2458.0)
  - [Continue monitoring AIO product development for potential future consideration](https://fathom.video/share/-z2iTS6-S_oE8pFS5wCQdC8TRAFxoH52?tab=summary&timestamp=2393.0)

action_items.description: Send list of pattern insights available in enterprise product's pattern table
Check internally re: possibility & timeframe for adding API integration to AIO product
Prepare & send detailed pricing proposal for enterprise product (incl. service token breakdown)
Provide info to Kevin: # of clients/projects, # of keywords/client, # of users, tech crawler need
Email Jason w/ list of required info for pricing proposal
Set up Slack connect channel w/ Jason for team Q&A on enterprise product
